title: Stemodiacra subhastata

intro: Stemodiacra subhastata, also known as Mexican skullcap, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Stemodiacra subhastata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
